name: Data Act
description: EU Data Act (Regulation (EU) 2023/2854) — harmonized rules on fair access to and use of data generated by connected products and related services. Covers data sharing between businesses and with public sector, cloud-switching, and interoperability.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-switching provisions (Chapter VI) directly regulate cloud providers — requirements for facilitating customer migration to other providers.
relationToAISecurity: Data sharing obligations affect AI training data sourcing from connected products.

license.notes: EU legislation published in OJEU. Reuse permitted under EUR-Lex terms; attribution expected.

current_extraction.tool: Playwright (HTML retrieval, EUR-Lex WAF bypass) + extract_eu_regulation.py (ELI parser)
current_extraction.notes: HTML fetched via Playwright (EUR-Lex WAF blocks automated curl) then parsed with the generic regulation/europa.eu/extract_eu_regulation.py using ELI class markup. CELEX 32023R2854. Output: Data Act-articles.{csv,json} (50 articles), Data Act-recitals.{csv,json} (120 recitals).

extraction_history.reason: Initial structured extraction; HTML fetched via Playwright (EUR-Lex WAF) and parsed via shared ELI extractor

notes: Metadata stub; acquire source and extract.
